introduction: SYNOPSISA woman is killed in a deluxe apartment. The killed woman is Lee Seon-Ok, whose husband, O Jeong-Keun, dances 'Cheoyongmu'. He was in the middle of the performance and his daughter slept out at the time when she was killed. And their alibis are proven. Detective Choi traces Doctor An Dong-Ik, who was a lover of Lee Seon-Ok. A clue is that she was pregnant but her husband is impotent. Doctor An, however, denies his crime. Then, Detective Choi visits a master of 'Cheoyongmu' and examines closely. After all, Detective Choi makes O Jeong-Keun confess his guilt through the thorough investigation by O Jeong-Keun's physical defect. With the admiration for Cheoyong, O Jeong-Keun admits himself that he is only a man and walks into the sea from which Cheoyong came out.故事一名女子在豪华公寓大楼中遇难。被谋杀的女子原来是他的妻子李善良。在她去世的时候，她的丈夫正在做当地的表演，而她的女儿还活着。蔡医生，李善'的医生董冬冬，是李善was怀孕的一个线索，她的丈夫是一个性犯罪者。但是，他否认了这一罪行，并且发现了民间传说的权威并挖掘了他的剑。最后，蔡彩才向他索要物质上的瑕疵，以供认罪。他崇拜清雍，承认自己只是一个人，走进了清龙出现的大海。
